title: P10 production stability baseline audit
objective:
Run script:
"""
from pathlib import Path
import json
from datetime import datetime

report = Path('governance/reports/bem526_p10_baseline_audit.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proof = Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem526_p10_baseline_audit.txt')
proof.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

workflow_dir = Path('.github/workflows')
workflow_files = sorted(workflow_dir.glob('*.yml')) + sorted(workflow_dir.glob('*.yaml'))
workflow_summary = []
schedule_hits = []
for wf in workflow_files:
    text = wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
    has_schedule = 'schedule:' in text
    has_dispatch = 'workflow_dispatch:' in text or 'workflow_dispatch' in text
    workflow_summary.append(f'- {wf}: workflow_dispatch={has_dispatch}, schedule={has_schedule}')
    if has_schedule:
        schedule_hits.append(str(wf))

codex = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
codex_text = codex.read_text(errors='ignore') if codex.exists() else ''
checks = {
    'codex_runner_exists': codex.exists(),
    'codex_runner_ubuntu_latest': 'runs-on: ubuntu-latest' in codex_text,
    'codex_runner_python_executor': 'Python executor' in codex_text or 'python3' in codex_text,
    'codex_runner_no_codex_cli': 'codex exec' not in codex_text,
    'codex_runner_no_openai_api_key': 'OPENAI_API_KEY' not in codex_text,
    'no_schedule_triggers': len(schedule_hits) == 0,
}

state_path = Path('governance/state/roadmap_state.json')
state = json.loads(state_path.read_text()) if state_path.exists() else {}
current_phase = state.get('current_phase')
phase_title = state.get('phase_title')
blocker = state.get('blocker')

status = 'PASS' if all(checks.values()) and current_phase == 'P10' and blocker is None else 'BLOCKER'

report.write_text(f'''# BEM-526 | P10 Production Stability Baseline Audit | {status}

Дата: 2026-05-17 | 11:45 (UTC+3)

## Проверки
- current_phase: {current_phase}
- phase_title: {phase_title}
- blocker: {blocker}
- codex_runner_exists: {checks['codex_runner_exists']}
- codex_runner_ubuntu_latest: {checks['codex_runner_ubuntu_latest']}
- codex_runner_python_executor: {checks['codex_runner_python_executor']}
- codex_runner_no_codex_cli: {checks['codex_runner_no_codex_cli']}
- codex_runner_no_openai_api_key: {checks['codex_runner_no_openai_api_key']}
- no_schedule_triggers: {checks['no_schedule_triggers']}

## Workflows
{chr(10).join(workflow_summary)}

## Schedule hits
{schedule_hits}

## Итог
P10 baseline audit status: {status}.
Executor policy: free ubuntu-latest Python executor, no paid OpenAI API.
No issue comments. No schedule triggers.
''')

proof.write_text(f'BEM-526 P10 baseline audit {status}. current_phase={current_phase}. no_schedule_triggers={checks["no_schedule_triggers"]}. codex_runner_ubuntu_latest={checks["codex_runner_ubuntu_latest"]}. python_executor={checks["codex_runner_python_executor"]}. no_paid_api={checks["codex_runner_no_openai_api_key"]}.\n')

changed_files.extend([str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append(f'P10 production stability baseline audit completed with status {status}')
"""
No issue comments.
